case_title: VLADIMIR RABKIN VS. CIRCLE OF FRIENDS ADHC, INC.

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CIRCLE OF FRIENDS ADHC, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-23-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RABKIN, VLADIMIR IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CIRCLE OF FRIENDS ADHC, INC. IF PLAINTIFF HAD A VIABLE CLAIM, HIS CAUSE OF ACTION OCCURRED (AT THE LATEST) ON FEBRUARY 12, 2012, WHEN PLAINTIFF WAS DISCHARGED FROM DEFENDANT'S SENIOR CARE FACILITY FOR "IMPROPER CONDUCT". THE FOUR YEAR STATUE FOR BREACH OF A WRITTEN CONTRACT HAS EXPIRED ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM WHICH HE FILED ON FEBRUARY 19, 2016. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

DEFENDANT CIRCLE OF FRIENDS ADHC, INC IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY YURY KAMENETSKY, NURSE. PRIOR TO THE HEARING THE PLAINTIFF CALLED THE ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICE AAND LEFT A MESSAGE STATING THAT HE WAS UNABLE TO MAKE THE HEARING. HIS CAR WAS BROKEN INTO AND HE WAS GOING TO THE POLICE. HE CALLED BACK TO SAY THAT HE WAS GOING TO THE DOCTORS OFFICE FOR A SHOT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
